name: Click in Place 6.7qt Clear Shallow Plastic Storage Bin with White Latch for Home and Office Organization - Brightroom™
description:
Organize your home in sleek style with this 7.2-Quart Shallow Bin from Brightroom™. Featuring a stackable design for compact spaces, this transparent shallow bin lets you easily see what you've stored inside. Designed in a sleek shape, this storage box comes with two side integrated handles for easy carrying around, and it has a capacity of 7.2 quarts for ample storage.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
